native.training_toml:
[dataset]
cache_dir = "__dragon_network_profile_cache__"
train_split_ratio = 0.8999999761581421
type = "universality_nca"
config = "nca-corpus.toml"

[dataset.tokenizer]
type = "pretokenized"
vocab_size = 50257
eos_id = 50256

[training]
block_size = 128
tbptt_persist_across_steps = false
batch_size = 4
seed = 1337
gradient_accumulation_steps = 1
max_iters = 24
checkpoint_interval_iters = 4
log_frequency = 1
launch_mode = "fresh"
module_lr_scales = []

[training.init_transfer]
preserve_interface_input_embedding = false
preserve_interface_output_head = false
preserve_fresh_decoder = false
preserve_fresh_norm = false
match_fresh_rms = false

[training.continual_backprop]
enabled = true
target = "shared_lowrank_latents"
utility_decay = 0.9900000095367432
replacement_rate = 0.00009999999747378752
maturity_steps = 100
sample_interval_steps = 8
replace_interval_steps = 64
utility_epsilon = 0.0000009999999974752427
lr_coupling = "none"
lr_coupling_power = 1.0

[training.context_strategy]
type = "infinite"

[optimizer]
name = "adamw"
learning_rate = 0.001
weight_decay = 0.0
schedule_mode = "dragon_reference"

[parallel]
mode = "single"
world_size = 1

[parallel.data]
size = 1
backend = "auto"
find_unused_parameters = false
gradient_as_bucket_view = true

[parallel.tensor]
size = 1
axis = "neuron"
partition = "contiguous"
sequence_parallel = false

[parallel.fsdp]
enabled = false
reshard_after_forward = false
cpu_offload = false
mixed_precision = "disabled"

[parallel.checkpoint]
format = "unsharded_v1"
async_write = false

[parallel.pipeline]
enabled = false
stage_count = 1
virtual_stages_per_rank = 1
schedule = "interleaved_1f1b"
microbatches = 1
partition = "layer_contiguous"
activation_checkpointing = false
shared_weight_sync = "all_reduce_per_step"
communication = "activation_tensor"

[parallel.pipeline.cache]
enabled = false
policy = "disabled"
reuse_across_backward = true
max_inflight_microbatches = 1
eviction = "step_boundary"
transport_dtype = "auto"

[generation]
prompt = "0 0 0"
temperature = 1.0
output_format = "auto"

[generation.context_strategy]
type = "infinite"

[generation.prompt_tokenizer]
source = "dataset"

[generation.decode_tokenizer]
source = "dataset"

[wgpu]
backend = "auto"
memory = "subslices"

[wgpu.training.startup_autotune]
enabled = false
target_device_memory_mb = 0
min_batch_size = 1
probe_steps = 1
binary_search = true

[wgpu.inference]
generation_executor = "baseline"
generation_chunk_tokens = 8
generation_device_buffer_tokens = 64

[run_layout]
mirror_config_path = true

[model]
n_layer = 4
n_embd = 64
n_head = 4
latent_total = 128

[model.language_head]
type = "nca_factorized_patch"
state_count = 10
patch_size = 2
frame_special_tokens = true
eos_id = 50256
native.nca_corpus_toml:
output_dir = "./generated/nca-r1"
seed = 1337
name = "burn-dragon-mainnet-nca-r1"
train_samples = 256
validation_samples = 64
chunk_token_capacity = 4096

train_source.corpus_toml:
output_dir = "./generated/nca-r1"
seed = 1337
name = "burn-dragon-mainnet-nca-r1"
train_samples = 256
validation_samples = 64
chunk_token_capacity = 4096

eval_source.corpus_toml:
output_dir = "./generated/nca-r1"
seed = 1337
name = "burn-dragon-mainnet-nca-r1"
train_samples = 256
validation_samples = 64
chunk_token_capacity = 4096
